content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

June 11, 2003

Lawrence E. Ornell
Office of the District Attorney
Juvenile Division Los Guilucos
111 Pythian Road North
Santa Rosa, CA 95409

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-061

Dear Mr. Ornell:

This letter is written notification that we have withdrawn the above-captioned request for advice relating to the disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ As of this date, you have not provided the results of communications with your agency/filing officer as requested in my May 27, 2003, correspondence, which is necessary for completion of our analysis.

If you are able to obtain the requested information in the future, please submit another inquiry.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jill Stecher
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg
I:\Advice Ltrs\03061

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997 of the California Code of Regulations.

May 27, 2003

Lawrence E. Ornell
Office of the District Attorney
Juvenile Division Los Guilucos
111 Pythian Road North
Santa Rosa, CA 95409

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 03-061

Dear Mr. Ornell:

As discussed in our initial conversation of April 10, 2003, the Fair Political Practices Commission will assist you with an analysis, but you first need to contact your agency or filing officer regarding these issues.

Please provide me with the results of your communications with your agency/filing officer on these questions by June 5, 2003, and whether you need additional assistance, so that we may proceed with your advice request.

Should you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 327-2020.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jill Stecher
Staff Counsel
